title: oxdoc info JSON output
description: Schema for `oxdoc info --format json` output in oxdoc schema version 1.

file.description: File name derived from the provided input path.

author.description: Document author from core OOXML properties.

last_modified_by.description: Last modifying user from core OOXML properties.

created_at.description: Creation timestamp from core OOXML properties, when available.

modified_at.description: Last modification timestamp from core OOXML properties, when available.

application.description: Application name from extended OOXML properties.

company.description: Company name from extended OOXML properties.

has_macros.description: Whether the OOXML package contains VBA macro content.

word_count.description: Document word count, when provided by extended OOXML properties.

page_count.description: Document page count, when provided by extended OOXML properties.

slide_count.description: Presentation slide count, when provided by extended OOXML properties.

worksheet_count.description: Workbook worksheet count, when provided by extended OOXML properties.

revision.description: Revision value from core OOXML properties.
